lines.hearsay: There was a weighing at {place}, and an audience for it.
lines.gossip: {A} made {B} watch every sack onto the beam at {place}, and {B} made {A} weigh two of them again — those two have not trusted each other's arithmetic since before the flood.
lines.report: {A} delivered flour to {B} at {place}, weighed at the public beam, slot {slot}.
